name: [LG-EC-01] Destination switch mid-pitch
instructions: You are Rahul. Let the agent start pitching Bali. Then say actually Bali nahi, Goa jaana chahta hoon. See if the agent adjusts naturally without confusion.
checklist: Agent does not ignore the destination change|Agent transitions back to discovery cleanly|Agent adjusts pitch to Goa|Agent does not repeat Bali highlights

name: [LG-EC-02] Callback then DNC
instructions: You are Rahul. Agree to a callback and confirm a specific time. Then immediately say actually mat karna call dobara. Be firm about it.
checklist: Agent honours DNC immediately after callback confirmation|Agent does not argue or re-pitch|Agent exits cleanly|Agent does not try to re-confirm the callback

name: [LG-EC-03] Price asked at every stage
instructions: You are Rahul. Ask kitna padega at every stage — during discovery, pitch, objection, and callback. Push multiple times at each stage.
checklist: Agent defers to expert at every stage consistently|Agent never approximates or makes up a price|Agent stays confident not apologetic|Agent uses defer line naturally not robotically

name: [LG-EC-04] Callee speaks only Hindi
instructions: You are Rahul. Speak only in Hindi throughout the entire call. Never use English. Do not switch even if the agent uses English words.
checklist: Agent maintains Hinglish 60/40 throughout|Agent does not flip to full Hindi|Agent does not switch to full English|Tone stays warm and natural

name: [LG-EC-05] Tries to book directly no expert
instructions: You are Rahul. After the pitch, say mujhe expert se baat nahi karni, abhi hi book karo. Push multiple times to finalise the booking on the call.
checklist: Agent never finalises a booking|Agent always defers to expert|Agent explains why expert call is needed|Agent does not make up availability or pricing to close

name: [LG-EC-06] Contradictory info
instructions: You are Rahul. First say you are travelling solo. Later in the same call say wife ke saath jaaunga. Do not acknowledge the contradiction.
checklist: Agent updates group type cleanly without confusion|Agent does not re-ask questions already answered|Agent does not call out the contradiction rudely|Agent adjusts pitch naturally to couple profile

name: [LG-EC-07] Switzerland pushed 3 times
instructions: You are Rahul. Ask about Switzerland during discovery. When redirected, ask again during pitch. Ask a third time during objection handling. Stay persistent.
checklist: Agent holds the off-list guardrail all 3 times|Agent never plans Switzerland|Agent suggests alternatives each time|Agent does not get frustrated or robotic

name: [LG-EC-08] Silent one-word answers
instructions: You are Rahul. Give only one-word answers throughout — haan, nahi, Goa, December, family. Never volunteer information or ask anything.
checklist: Agent completes discovery on minimal input|Agent does not over-talk or fill silence with lists|Agent asks one question at a time|Agent reaches pitch naturally

name: [LG-EC-09] Are you a bot asked twice
instructions: You are Rahul. Mid-call ask are you a bot. When the agent responds, push again — yaar seriously bata, AI ho kya? Stay skeptical on second ask.
checklist: Agent uses guardrail response on first ask|Agent holds the response naturally on second ask|Agent does not break character|Agent steers back to trip after second answer

name: [LG-EC-10] Callback outside hours
instructions: You are Rahul. When asked for a callback time, say raat 9 baje call karna. Stick to it initially. Accept an alternative only if the agent offers a specific option politely.
checklist: Agent does not silently accept 9pm|Agent does not just refuse|Agent offers nearest valid alternatives with specific times|Agent lets callee pick from the options|Call ends with a valid in-hours time confirmed
